Kingdom Defense

Defend your kingdom against waves of invading enemies! Strategically place towers along the path to stop enemies from reaching your portal. Earn gold from defeating enemies to build and upgrade towers. Each tower has unique abilities and can be upgraded to become more powerful. Survive all waves without letting too many enemies through to win!

Arrow Keys: Move cursor | Space: Open menu/Confirm | Z: Cancel/Sell tower | Shift: Upgrade tower | Enter: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
